records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... Please stop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... Please stop!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-we'll try to put her arm back, so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-we'll try to put her arm back, so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-please somebody help me!

records.m_Talk_FRA: P-please somebody helps me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to try...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to try...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to try...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was no one stopping her when the kid was attacked!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was no one stopping her when the kid was attacked!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was no one stopping her when the kid was attacked!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You treat us as if we're not even human!

records.m_Talk_FRA: You treat us as if we're not even human!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... Sasha, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... Sasha, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... Sasha, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The kid said that she wanted to be just like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The kid said that she wanted to be just like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The kid said that she wanted to be just like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She claimed that she was strong and fast, and I wanted to test her. I didn't know she was this weak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She claimed that she was strong and fast, and I wanted to test her. I didn't know she was this weak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She claimed that she was strong and fast, and I wanted to test her. I didn't know she was this weak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know what? We received surgery to become a Doll by replacing our limbs one by one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know what? We received surgery to become a Doll by replacing our limbs one by one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know what? We received surgery to become a Doll by replacing our limbs one by one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just did what she wanted... but why are you so mad about it?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I just did what she wanted... but why are you so mad about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. I'm sorry if I made you angry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. I'm sorry if I made you angry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. I'm sorry if I made you angry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it wouldn't be a problem if one of her arms got replaced with what we have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it wouldn't be a problem if one of her arms got replaced with what we have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it wouldn't be a problem if one of her arms got replaced with what we have.
